emails.body:
DEFENSE NEWS DAILY DIGEST — 30 SEP 2026

TOP STORIES
• SECDEF memo directs services to accelerate AI/ML integration in ISR pipelines by FY28
• House Armed Services markup adds $420M for Pacific Deterrence Initiative shipyard infrastructure
• NORTHCOM completes Arctic comms exercise; latency improvements cited

ACQUISITION
• NGAD engine downselect slips to Q2 FY27 per GAO watchdog report
• Army awards $1.2B contract for next-gen tactical network radios

OPERATIONS
• INDOPACOM announces joint exercise Keen Sword 27 dates; 12 nations confirmed
• CENTCOM reports 14% increase in UAS intercepts over previous quarter

PERSONNEL
• Navy extends HYT waivers for nuclear-trained ratings through FY27
• Space Force announces new cyber career field merger

BUDGET
• CR likely through mid-December; appropriators signal defense topline near $886B

---
You received this because you subscribed to Defense News Daily Digest.

DEFENSE NEWS DAILY DIGEST — 02 OCT 2026

TOP STORIES
• Senate SASC schedules classified briefing on mosaic warfare concept for 15 Oct
• Joint Staff releases updated JADC2 implementation plan v3.1
• DARPA announces breakthrough in neuromorphic computing for edge processing

ACQUISITION
• MQ-9 Reaper replacement RFP delayed 60 days for requirements refinement
• Navy awards detail design contract for DDG(X) — decision expected FY28
• Air Force begins KC-Y bridge tanker source selection

OPERATIONS
• EUCOM deploys additional air defense batteries to eastern flank
• SOUTHCOM concludes Tradewinds 26 with 21 partner nations
• CYBERCOM elevates ransomware threat posture for defense industrial base

TECHNOLOGY
• NGA releases commercial GEOINT strategy emphasizing multi-INT fusion
• DIU prototypes maritime domain awareness using commercial SAR constellations

PERSONNEL
• DoD announces 4.5% pay raise for 2027, matching ECI
• New blended retirement system matching contributions take effect 1 Jan

---

DEFENSE NEWS DAILY DIGEST — 04 OCT 2026

TOP STORIES
• White House releases National Security Strategy implementation guidance
• SECDEF orders 90-day review of autonomous weapons policy
• Congress returns; NDAA conference expected to begin next week

ACQUISITION
• F-35 TR-3 hardware deliveries resume after 8-month pause
• Army selects two vendors for Future Attack Reconnaissance Aircraft prototype phase
• Space Force awards $2.3B in proliferated LEO comms contracts

OPERATIONS
• INDOPACOM conducts freedom of navigation operation in South China Sea
• AFRICOM transitions lead for Libya coordination to State Dept
• NORAD intercepts Russian bomber formation near Alaska ADIZ

INTELLIGENCE
• ODNI releases annual threat assessment; highlights PRC pacing challenge
• NGA director testifies on GEOINT workforce gaps before HPSCI

BUDGET
• CBO projects defense spending growth at 2.1% annually through 2034
• OMB issues apportionment guidance for potential CR scenarios

---
